memberdef.name: ARCH_IRQ_CONNECT
memberdef.initializer: { \ Z_ISR_DECLARE(irq_p, 0, isr_p, isr_param_p); \ z_irq_priority_set(irq_p, priority_p, flags_p); \ }

memberdef.name: ARCH_ISR_DIRECT_FOOTER

briefdescription.para: Renesas RX specific kernel interface header.

detaileddescription.para: This header contains the Renesas RX specific kernel interface. It is included by the kernel interface architecture-abstraction header (include/zephyr/arch/cpu.h).
